title: × eriosonia longifolia
intro: × Eriosonia longifolia, also known as the Himalayan sweet gale or Erinosonia longifolia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Saxifragaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Eriosonia longifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, among others. × Eriosonia longifolia is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
